title: Anti Mace Disabler
description: Disables the vanilla mace recipe for any form of crafting (table, crafters)
body:
# ❌ Anti Mace
Anti Mace Disabler is a lightweight Minecraft Paper plugin that completely disables the crafting of the mace item, introduced in Minecraft 1.21.

## **✅ Features**
Blocks all mace crafting recipes

Works out-of-the-box on Paper 1.21+

No permissions, setup, or configuration needed

Compatible with most plugins and datapacks

### **📦 Installation**
Drop the plugin .jar into your server's plugins folder.

Restart the server.

Done!
